ai_summary: Tirupati Forge Limited announced the final conversion of 850,000 outstanding convertible warrants into equity shares by four non-promoter allottees at ₹32 per share, completing the full conversion of all 11,760,000 warrants issued in January 2025. This preferential allotment injected ₹2.04 crore of fresh capital and increased the company's paid-up equity capital by ₹17 lakhs, resulting in a minor shareholder dilution of approximately 0.66%. The complete conversion eliminates future uncertainty regarding these instruments, with no immediate red flags identified.
